title: 49ers hire Matt Eberflus as assistant head coach of defense
description: According to NFL Network insider Tom Pelissero, the San Francisco 49ers have reportedly hired Matt Eberflus to serve as the team's new assistant head coach of defense.

title: Next Health Enters Washington, Opening First State Location in Bellevue as Longevity Demand Accelerates
description: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #bellevue--Next Health expands to Washington with its first state location in Bellevue, bringing advanced health optimization & longevity services to the region.

title: Pentagon informs Anthropic it is a supply chain risk
description: The Pentagon has slapped a formal supply-chain risk designation on artificial intelligence lab Anthropic, its CEO said on Thursday (Mar 5). title: Crown Point confirmed in Turning Point USA's 'Make Heaven Crowded' tour
description: The Make Heaven Crowded Tour will stop at Living Stones Church in Crown Point this summer.

title: Kurdish groups say they're preparing to join Iran war, AP reports
description: Kurdish groups based in Iraq say they're preparing to join the fight against Iran, the Associated Press reports. CBS News Middle East contributor Courtney Kealy has more.

title: Berkeley commissioners plan data center town hall, renew participation in regional housing program
description: MARTINSBURG - Berkeley County Commissioners said they plan to hold a public town hall to address community concerns about a proposed large-scale data center, while also approving continued participation in a regional housing consortium during the County Commission’s regular meeting...
